title: adicea laxa
intro: Adicea laxa, also known as the 'Slippery Elm', is a plant species belonging to the elm family, characterized by its distinctive, mottled bark and edible inner bark. The medicinal properties of Adicea laxa lie in its mucilaginous inner bark, which has anti-inflammatory and soothing effects on the digestive system. The health benefits of Adicea laxa include its ability to treat irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues due to its soothing properties, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of sore throats and coughs. Adicea laxa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and lozenges, making it a popular natural remedy for digestive issues and other health concerns.
